title: CJC-1295
description: CJC-1295 is a synthetic growth hormone-releasing hormone (GHRH) analog that stimulates growth hormone secretion. It provides sustained GH release and is popular for anti-aging, muscle growth, fat loss, and recovery enhancement.

research.title: Prolonged stimulation of growth hormone and insulin-like growth factor I secretion by CJC-1295 in healthy adults
research.summary: CJC-1295 effectively increases growth hormone and IGF-I levels in healthy adults with potential therapeutic utility.

research.title: Once-daily administration of CJC-1295 normalizes growth in the GHRH knockout mouse
research.summary: Once-daily CJC-1295 maintains normal body composition and growth in GHRH knockout mice.

research.title: Human growth hormone-releasing factor albumin bioconjugates activate the GRF receptor on the anterior pituitary in rats: identification of CJC-1295
research.summary: CJC-1295 is a stable, active human growth hormone-releasing factor analog with extended plasma half-life.

research.title: Pulsatile secretion of growth hormone persists during continuous stimulation by CJC-1295
research.summary: CJC-1295 increases GH secretion and IGF-I production with preserved pulsatility, suggesting clinical utility.

research.title: Netnography of Female Use of the Synthetic Growth Hormone CJC-1295: Pulses and Potions
research.summary: Females self-medicate with CJC-1295 for weight loss, muscle enhancement, youthful skin, improved sleep, and injury healing.

sentiment.summary: Users report improved sleep, recovery, and body composition. Often preferred stacked with a GHRP for synergistic GH release. Results take weeks to become noticeable.

effects.label: Synergy with GHRPs:
effects.description: Best results when combined with GHRP-2 or GHRP-6.

effects.label: Gradual Benefits:
effects.description: Changes in body composition take 2-3 months to manifest.

effects.label: Individual Response:
effects.description: Results vary based on age and baseline GH levels.

dosage.label: Timing:
dosage.description: Often injected before bed to complement natural GH pulse.

sideEffects.label: Water Retention:
sideEffects.description: Temporary bloating possible during initial use.
